summary: Revenue leakage workflow UI: ranked anomaly tasks with severity/VND impact, masked evidence drill-down via resolveEvidence, leakage-specific empty state, shared no-op executor. Rebased onto main (#119); SellerHomeShell routes new_seller + leakage workflows. No TikTok API calls; PII keys excluded from evidence drawer.

interfaceChanges.description: Pure function mapping evidence_refs to masked orders/returns/affiliate slices from persona.
Leakage workflow panel with ranked tasks, evidence drill-down, and Vietnamese empty state.
Per-task evidence drawer showing masked order/return/affiliate rows.
Routes leakage workflow to LeakageCopilotPanel instead of generic TaskQueue.

mappings.criterion: Leakage persona renders ranked anomaly tasks with severity and VND impact
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_revenue_leakage_ui.test.tsx::renders ranked anomaly tasks with severity labels

mappings.criterion: Drill-down shows supporting mock evidence (order IDs, return reasons, affiliate IDs — masked)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_revenue_leakage_ui.test.tsx::opens evidence drawer without forbidden PII field names

mappings.criterion: Recommended fix visible per anomaly (task body + cta_label)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_revenue_leakage_ui.test.tsx::shows recommended fix via task body and cta_label
web/src/__tests__/test_revenue_leakage_ui.test.tsx::approve/dismiss uses shared executor on leakage tasks

mappings.criterion: Empty state: Không phát hiện rò rỉ tuần này for persona with no signals
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_revenue_leakage_ui.test.tsx::shows "Không phát hiện rò rỉ tuần này" when persona has no leakage tasks

mappings.criterion: Integration test: leakage persona renders anomalies with severity labels
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_revenue_leakage_ui.test.tsx::renders ranked anomaly tasks with severity labels

mappings.criterion: Integration test: drill-down opens evidence without PII fields
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_revenue_leakage_ui.test.tsx::resolveEvidence maps evidence_refs to masked entity slices
